//: Copy to ~/.config/powerspaces/config.json. User entries override built-in defaults; unknown apps use defaultStrategy. Strategies: openArgs, newInstance, appleScript, warn, quitReopen, cmdN, focusOnly. (Single-window apps already open on another desktop can't be given a new window on the current one — macOS won't allow it — so they default to warn. To force one onto the current desktop anyway, set it to quitReopen: it quits the app and relaunches it here, but loses anything unsaved or playing.)

apps.appleScript: tell application "Safari" to make new document
tell application "Finder" to make new Finder window
